name: Production discrepancy: Partial flow vs full flow
description: Non-V1 user where production finds a partial path (~0.0047 CRC) but staging finds a full 1 CRC path. Demonstrates production has SOME trust edges but is missing many others needed for full flow.
notes: Production finds a 5-transfer path with maxFlow of 0.00473 CRC. Staging finds a 16-transfer path with maxFlow of 1 CRC. The partial flow indicates production has some edges but is missing trust relationships needed for optimal routing.

prodResult.description: Finds limited path: 0x5f2b63... -> 0xf3d6b8... -> gateway (4.324e15) + separate branch (4.08e14)

stagingResult.description: Complex multi-hop path utilizing full trust network
